com.jsyn.unitgen

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    UnitVoice
    All Known Implementing Classes:

    public interface UnitSource
    Interface for things that have that have an output and an associated UnitGenerator.
    Author:
    Phil Burk, (C) 2009 Mobileer Inc
